Business Hours
DayHours
Monday - Friday9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday10:00 AM - 4:00 PM

Shipping Information

Delivery Times

Standard delivery: 3-5 business days within Greece. Free shipping on orders over €50.

Tracking

You'll receive a tracking link via email once your order ships.

Returns Policy

30-Day Returns

Not satisfied? Return unopened products within 30 days for a full refund.

How to Return

Contact us to get a return label. Pack items securely and drop off at any pickup point.

Help Center

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about Blossom fragrances. Can't find what you're looking for? Feel free to contact us.

Products
Browse common questions about products.

Still Have Questions?
We're here to help. Reach out to our team and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
